/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/des/DESCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/des/des_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/crypto_core/FeistelCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/crypto_core/FeistelNetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/bits/Pbox_permutation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/src/bits/Sbox_substitution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crypto_demo.dir/main.cpp.o -o crypto_demo
